name: Kagi
author: sleepyhauru
description: Kagi Translate integration with translate and rewrite commands plus message context tools for message-based translation and style rewrites.
install_msg: Load it with `[p]load kagi`. Configure it in DMs with `[p]kagi setkagi <value>` and `[p]kagi settranslate <value>`, then verify with `[p]kagi test`. To enable the message context commands, run `[p]slash enablecog kagi` and `[p]slash sync`.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores bot owner-provided Kagi session values and model configuration. It does not store user-submitted translation text.
